name: Aya Expanse (8B & 32B)
tagline: Open-weight multilingual models in 8B and 32B sizes across 23 languages; 32B remains live, 8B retired Apr 4, 2026.
metaDescription: Aya Expanse (8B & 32B) (Cohere), released 2024-10-24 — part of the Aya Expanse line. Open-weight multilingual models in 8B and 32B sizes across 23 languages; 3…
overview: Aya Expanse (8B & 32B) is a large language model from Cohere, part of the Aya Expanse line. Released 2024-10-24. Open-weight multilingual model family from Cohere Labs covering 23 languages.
What's notable in this version: Open-weight multilingual models in 8B and 32B sizes across 23 languages; 32B remains live, 8B retired Apr 4, 2026.
